content.en:
"Finally become a fourfold ancestor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, the most powerful of the Quadruple Heavenly Gate is only the Quadruple Ancestor, and only the Fivefold Sacred Gate has a Quadruple Ancestor.

The Quadruple Ancestor was already a very powerful existence, and his strength was also an incomparably powerful existence in the Quadruple Ancestor, almost invincible.

"Last time in the Supreme Treasure Land, I obtained too many resources, the cultivation resources are enough, I can quickly improve my cultivation, and when I reach the peak of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor, maybe I will be qualified to compete with the weaker Fivefold Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to improve his cultivation, and he had enough resources, so the speed of cultivation improvement was very fast.

Of course.

After reaching the Quadruple Ancestor, although the Extreme Dao Will can be improved, the Will Pagoda is fixed, and there is no way to continue to increase the number of layers of the Will Pagoda, but it can temper the Will Pagoda again and again, which can improve the quality of the Will Pagoda and make the Will Pagoda stronger and stronger.

"It's a pity that I don't know how to become a Five-Fold Ancestor yet!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, countless Fourfold Origin Ancestors don't know how to become Fivefold Origin Ancestors, and regarding the inheritance in this regard, the Fivefold Holy Gate is very strictly controlled, and it is not allowed to spread.

Even the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate would not be able to obtain this kind of inheritance until he became the peak of the Quadruple Ancestor.

Of course, how to become a half-step fivefold ancestor, the Void Tooth Holy Gate can still be exchanged for such an inheritance.

And Ye Tian quickly exchanged his contribution points for how to become the inheritance of the half-step fivefold ancestor.

"Extreme Path Alchemy!"

Any Quadruple Origin Ancestor peak powerhouse who wants to be promoted to a half-step Fivefold Origin Ancestor must refine his Will Pagoda more than nine times, and this process requires the Extreme Dao Refining Technique.

The Extreme Dao Quenching Technique is suitable for every Quadruple Ancestor, and you only need to use the Extreme Dao Quenching Technique to cooperate with your own Extreme Extreme Dao to form your own Extreme Dao Quenching Technique, so as to refine the Will Pagoda.

Refining nine times is the minimum requirement, as long as you reach more than nine times, you can go to the half-step fivefold ancestor realm.

However, the half-step fivefold ancestor, who had only been tempered nine times, actually did not increase his strength much.

With Ye Tian's current strength, it was enough to kill such a half-step fivefold ancestor.

"It seems that refining the Will Pagoda more than nine times is one of the conditions for becoming a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, but what are the other conditions, I have to wait until I become the peak of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor before I can exchange for such a secret inheritance from the Void Tooth Holy Gate!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, Ye Tian is still very early to become a Fivefold Ancestor!

Moreover, it would take him countless years just to refine the Will Pagoda, after all, he didn't want to temper only nine times, but wanted to temper the Will Pagoda more times.

With the assistance of countless resources, Ye Tian's cultivation gradually approached the mid-stage realm of the Quadruple Ancestor.

And during this period of time, the Upper Spirit Origin Domain was also very calm, and nothing major happened.

But at the end of the world, something happened that had something to do with Ye Tian.

......

The End of the World.

The Origin Realm Sea began to transform, and he had used a set of formations to transform the Origin Realm Sea before, plus he had now become a Quadruple Ancestor, which greatly promoted the improvement of the Origin of the Realm Realm, and the Origin Realm Sea naturally changed even more.

Now, the Origin Realm Sea contains countless Extreme Dao Breaths, and its cultivation environment far surpasses the Extreme Dao True River, which is comparable to or even surpasses the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

And the Origin Realm Sea also gave birth to many powerhouses, among which the half-step perfect controller didn't know how many were born.

Even Ye Tian's Master Ten Elements Ancestor in the Eternal Controller period had been cultivated by Ye Tian, and he had now reached the realm of the True Realm Perfect Controller.

Of course, the human race has now become extremely powerful, it is the first clan of the Origin Realm Sea, the number of perfect controllers is quite large, and his relatives have been promoted to the realm of the original ancestor.

At present, the Origin Realm Sea has given birth to several First Origin Ancestors and dozens of Pseudo Origin Ancestors, second only to the Eternal Ruins.

In addition, there is Ye Tian sitting in the Origin Realm Sea, which makes the reputation of the Origin Realm Sea very loud, even surpassing the Extreme Dao True River.

That is, the Origin Realm Sea is still very young, otherwise if it is a long time later, this place will definitely surpass the Eternal Ruins and the Extreme True River.

"The transformation of the Origin Realm Sea has been successful, and it is more suitable for cultivation, it seems that in the future, even if the Origin Realm Sea does not have my support, many strong people will be born!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And as he continues to break through, the end of the realm will also slowly improve, as long as generations of original ancestors are born and a large number of triple origin ancestors are born, the end of the realm can also be promoted to the middle origin domain.

However, this step is too difficult, unless he is willing to spend countless resources to cultivate a large number of Triple Origin Ancestors, otherwise it will be too difficult to become a Triple Origin Ancestor just by relying on these Origin Ancestors to break through on their own!

Ye Tian will cultivate the Triple Ancestor, but he will not cultivate others, he will only cultivate the Wudao Pagoda, the Ten Elements Ancestor, a few senior brothers and sisters, and the powerhouses of the human race, and cultivate them to become the Triple Ancestor.

As for cultivators who have nothing to do with him, he won't cultivate!

this day.

The Lord of the Unbounded, that is, the Origin Ancestor of the Unbounded, came to the Origin Sea at the End of the Realm to visit Ye Tian.

"Endless Ancestor!"

The Boundless Ancestor said respectfully.

"Unbounded Ancestor, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the Boundless Origin Ancestor said embarrassedly: "I'm here to ask you for a favor, I have offended a Triple Sect, and the Supreme Elder of that sect is a newly promoted Quadruple Ancestor, and he personally killed my clone." The last time I sent a clone of my will to the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, he found it again and killed my clone again. If this continues, I won't be able to go to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain anymore. Therefore, I can only ask the Endless Ancestor you to do a favor and mediate and resolve the conflict. "

"Oh, why did he kill you?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Unbounded Origin Ancestor was just an ordinary Triple Origin Ancestor, and he would provoke a Quadruple Origin Ancestor to keep killing his clone, if he couldn't find the true body of the Boundless Origin Ancestor, I am afraid that he would kill him directly.

The Unbounded Origin Ancestor smiled bitterly: "It's not a deep hatred, it's just that I killed the will clone of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor in a secret realm in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and snatched an opportunity." This kind of resource fight is normal, who knew that the Quadruple Ancestor actually took action in person, and seeing that I had no background, he killed my will clone again and again. "

"Is that all?"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, on this matter, Endless Ancestor, after all, you are a disciple of the Fourfold Heavenly Gate, can you help mediate?"

"I'm no longer a disciple of the Quadruple Heavenly Gate!" Ye Tian said.

“......"

The Unbounded Ancestor was stunned, could it be that Ye Tian was expelled from the Quadruple Heavenly Gate?

But the next sentence directly shocked the Boundless Ancestor.

"I've joined the Void Fang Holy Gate in advance!"

Ye Tian said.

The matter of him becoming the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate was known to the Fivefold Holy Gate, but small people like the Boundless Ancestor naturally didn't know, and he didn't even know what disciples and big people the Fivefold Holy Gate had.

"Endless Ancestor, you have joined the Fivefold Holy Gate Void Fang Holy Gate!!! that will definitely help me mediate this conflict!"

A disciple of the Fivefold Holy Gate is not something that the Triple Sect can offend at all!

Subsequently, the clone of the Unbounded Origin Ancestor went to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain again, and Ye Tian took him to the Triple Sect to help him mediate.

After all, if it weren't for the Boundless Origin Ancestor, he wouldn't be able to enter the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, so this little favor would help!
